versions.description: Full site rebuild — 11 sections, real event photos, new brand system
changes: Rebuilt from 5-section placeholder to full 11-section site per spec
Added 8 real event photos from Google Drive (all 200/accessible confirmed)
New brand palette: #1a3a1a (deep forest green) + #f0ede8 (linen) + #7eb832 (accent)
Added Bebas Neue display font alongside Playfair Display + Inter
Custom cursor (8px dot + 32px ring), inverted on light sections
Grain texture on all dark sections via SVG feTurbulence
Scroll animations with IntersectionObserver (fadeUp, slideLeft, fadeIn)
Gallery with 5 vibe collection filter tabs (all / golden hour rooftop / night out / curated pours / table stories)
Sponsorship tiers: Bronze $5,000 (2 VIP) / Gold $10,000 (3 VIP) / Platinum $15,000 (5 VIP)
Stats band: 300+ guests / 5+ events / invite only
Who We Are section with event type cards
Next Event: April 25th / 75 Varick Rooftop / 10:30pm-3:30am ET
Why Sponsor: 4 numbered reasons with accent dividers
Past Sponsors: Mumm + Aperol (confirmed) + 4 Brand Partner placeholders
How It Works: 4-step flow with connecting line
Join The List: email form with inline confirmation
All contact info live: events@tigertracks.ai / (301) 646-7758 / @treehouseevents.nyc
Zero placeholder URLs (no PARTIFUL_URL_HERE, no PHOTO_URL_N)
